decision_reason: Fixture closure is bounded to direct local fixture report and evidence files.

checks.name: Direct closure evidence
checks.summary: Closure references direct fixture files and does not rely on runtime ids, PM text, stale history, or progress ledgers.

residual_risk: Closure is limited to the positive fixture and must be refreshed when fixture files change.
claim_boundary: This closure record covers only direct good_single_skill fixture files and current local reports. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
